meaning: v.赋予个性,个别地加以考虑
examples: You can individualize a document by adding comments in the margins.
Make sure to individualize our program.
Does your style of writing individualize your work?
Now users can individualize privacy settings for every move they make on the social networking site.
So technologies, whether it is a telephone or an iPhone, computers in general or automobiles, television even, all individualize us.
